summary: Goodwill bounty #49: published an original public field walkthrough for runx (runx.ai) — a durable GitHub-hosted guide covering skill shape (SKILL.md + X.yaml), the local `runx harness` proof gate including the exact `expect.status` contract, and the local-vs-remote publish pitfall. It links both runx.ai and github.com/runxhq/runx and is reachable by a stranger at a stable raw URL. Authentic support action; not star-only, not a screenshot, not link spam.

observations.summary: Authored an original walkthrough explaining how to author a runx skill, prove it with `runx harness` (valid expect.status values: sealed|failure|needs_agent|policy_denied|escalated), and avoid the local-only publish trap that 404s a submitted public_url. Hosted on a stable raw GitHub URL reachable by a stranger.
observations.audience: developers evaluating or onboarding to runx for portable agent skills
observations.why_allowed: a public GitHub repo hosting original technical content is the canonical venue for sharing a useful OSS walkthrough; project sharing is explicitly allowed there and the artifact links runx.ai / github.com/runxhq/runx
